file_insights.details: Added success message block with card count and verification hint after cleanup statistics. Message only displays when cleanup actually occurred (total_cards > 0 || stats.target_dirs_removed > 0).
file_insights.line_impact: Added 6 lines after freed MB output

patterns_discovered.description: CLI output includes both completion summary (✓ Cleaned N cards) and actionable next step (→ bop list to verify)
patterns_discovered.applicability: User guidance pattern - reduces cognitive load by telling users what to do after operation succeeds

patterns_discovered.description: Success message guarded by compound condition checking both total_cards and target_dirs_removed to avoid false positives
patterns_discovered.rationale: Prevents success message when dry_run is true or no cleanup occurred

patterns_discovered.description: Uses blank line before success message (println!()) and ✓ checkmark symbol for clear visual hierarchy
patterns_discovered.consistency: Matches common CLI tool conventions for status indication

gotchas_discovered.description: Message shows if (total_cards > 0 || stats.target_dirs_removed > 0) — need both clauses since either could indicate actual cleanup work
gotchas_discovered.impact: Low risk - correctly handles edge cases where stats.target_dirs_removed > 0 but total_cards = 0

gotchas_discovered.description: Success message added inside existing if !dry_run block, so it naturally respects dry-run mode
gotchas_discovered.impact: Positive - no additional dry_run checks needed, inherited from parent scope

approach_outcome.commit_quality: Clean single commit with focused diff

recommendations.suggestion: Apply same 'next-step hint' pattern to other card manipulation commands (bop new, bop delete, bop move) for consistent user experience
Consider standardizing arrow syntax (→ command) across all CLI hints for discoverability
Verify success message displays correctly in both dry_run=true and dry_run=false paths, including edge case where stats.target_dirs_removed > 0 but total_cards = 0
